name: @appaloft/sdk
description: TypeScript operation client for the Appaloft HTTP API.

scripts.build: bun run generate:operations && rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/internal.ts src/generated-operations.ts --target node --format esm --packages external --outdir dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src/index.ts test
